issues.resolution: Shared mutationClient interceptor mandatory for all mutations; auto UUIDv7 + If-Match + centralized 412/401/403/offline/5xx.
Transition policy table single-source across badges/dialogs/panels with i18n disabled-reason codes.
Stale-data policy: 30s stale-time + focus-refetch + inline stale banner; SSE hook designed for Phase 11.
Loading/empty/error/partial states required on every page+panel acceptance.
Offline banner, disable destructive CTAs, IndexedDB retry queue for idempotent routes.
Permission degradation: re-auth modal on 401, hide CTA on 403, caps poll for drift.
SignoffDialog state machine with 6 error classes, focus return, intent preservation.
Integrity panel: content_hash+version+ETag with copy + drift warning.
WCAG: axe CI, live-region, focus return, virtualized aria, contrast AA, error narration.
datetime.ts formatter: UTC payloads, browser tz, Intl locale-aware, pt-BR/en+DST tests.
Risk-based test matrix (9 rows) merge-gate in Task 9.11.

action_taken: All 11 fixes applied inline. Round 2 skipped.
